Minimal: when there are exactly 3 runes, use 60 base instead of 75. Simplest possible code: check if all items are runes and length is 3 → return 60 base + fee/etc. Or hardcode `if items.length===3 && all runes → base=60`. Just make this test pass while keeping prior tests green.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the current state and make the minimal change to pass the failing test.
Now I'll make the minimal change - when there are exactly 3 runes, use 60 as base instead of 75.

content.text:
All 7 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:

**Result**: All tests now pass (7 passing, 48 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal — guarded conditional for the exact "3 runes" case. No generalization for future block rules (4 runes, 7 runes, mixed types, etc.) — those tests will force generalization later.
